card.name: Aerial Combatant
card.text: Flying Whenever Aerial Combatant attacks, for each kind of counter on target permanent or player, give that permanent or player another counter of that kind.

card.name: Timberheart Guide
card.text: Vigilance {G}{W}, {T}, Put a stun counter on Timberheart Guide: Untap each other creature you control.

card.name: Depth Trawler
card.text: Menace Depth Trawler enters with a +1/+1 counter on it. Whenever one or more cards are put into a graveyard from a library, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Rending Maw
card.text: First strike, menace, haste

card.name: Thornbloom Shaman
card.text: Vigilance When Thornbloom Shaman enters, surveil 1, then exile up to one target card from a graveyard. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Thornbloom Shaman gets +1/+1 for each card you own in exile.

card.name: Reign's Follower
card.text: {T}: Tap another target nonland permanent. {T}: Untap another target permanent.

card.name: Brekka Shieldmage
card.text: Whenever Brekka Shieldmage attacks, you may put a stun counter on it. If you do, target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Backup Agent
card.text: When Backup Agent enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Raise the Alarm
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Soldier creature tokens.

card.name: Inspiring Captain
card.text: When Inspiring Captain enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Stormfront Pegasus
card.text: Flying (This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.)

card.name: Griffin Sentinel
card.text: Flying (This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.) Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)

card.name: Goldkeep Swordmaster
card.text: Whenever Goldkeep Swordmaster attacks, you may put a stun counter on it. If you do, it gets +3/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Auramancer
card.text: When Auramancer enters, you may return target enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Flitterguard
card.text: When Flitterguard enters, if it wasn't cast, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Workout Routine
card.text: Put a number of +1/+1 counters on target creature equal to one plus the number of cards named Workout Routine in your graveyard.

card.name: Jotlund Jotun
card.text: When Jotlund Jotun enters, distribute two +1/+1 counters among up two target creatures.

card.name: Expose to Daylight
card.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Pacifism
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature can't attack or block.

card.name: Violent Retribution
card.text: Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.) Destroy target creature if it's attacking or if this spell was kicked.

card.name: Kor Halberd
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has vigilance. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Dauntless Unity
card.text: Kicker {1}{W} (You may pay an additional {1}{W} as you cast this spell.) Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. If this spell was kicked, those creatures get +2/+1 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Recommission
card.text: Return target artifact or creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. If a creature enters this way, it enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Faerie Miscreant
card.text: Flying When Faerie Miscreant enters, if you control another creature named Faerie Miscreant, draw a card.

card.name: Dockside Infiltrator
card.text: Dockside Infiltrator can't be blocked as long as you control an artifact.

card.name: Tempest Owl
card.text: Kicker {4}{U} (You may pay an additional {4}{U} as you cast this spell.) Flying When Tempest Owl enters, if it was kicked, tap up to three target permanents.

card.name: Rime Lynx
card.text: When Rime Lynx enters, tap target creature you don't control and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Thunder Drake
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Thunder Drake.

card.name: Vedalken Entrancer
card.text: {U}, {T}: Target player mills two cards. (They put the top two cards of their library into their graveyard.)

card.name: Salvager of Secrets
card.text: When Salvager of Secrets enters, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Deep-Sea Terror
card.text: Deep-Sea Terror can't attack unless there are seven or more cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Wall of Scrap
card.text: Defender (This creature can't attack.) Sacrifice another artifact: Put a +1/+1 counter on Wall of Scrap. Sacrifice another artifact: Wall of Scrap can attack this turn as though it didn't have defender.

card.name: Cancel
card.text: Counter target spell.

card.name: Spurn
card.text: Counter target creature or planeswalker spell.

card.name: Out Cold
card.text: This spell can't be countered. (This includes by the ward ability.) Tap up to two target creatures and put a stun counter on each of them. Investigate. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead. To investigate, create a colorless Clue artifact token with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Divination
card.text: Draw two cards.

card.name: Opt
card.text: Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.) Draw a card.

card.name: Tome Scour
card.text: Target player mills five cards. (They put the top five cards of their library into their graveyard.)

card.name: Stealth Mission
card.text: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. It can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Viscera Seer
card.text: Sacrifice a creature: Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Rat Colony
card.text: Rat Colony gets +1/+0 for each other Rat you control. A deck can have any number of cards named Rat Colony.

card.name: Ambush Thrull
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)

card.name: Howling Phantom
card.text: Kicker {4}{B} (You may pay an additional {4}{B} as you cast this spell.) When Howling Phantom enters if it was kicked, each opponent loses 5 life.

card.name: Absorbing Tar
card.text: When Absorbing Tar enters or leaves, you may exile target card from a graveyard.

card.name: Gorging Vulture
card.text: Flying When Gorging Vulture enters, mill four cards. You gain 1 life for each creature card milled this way. (To mill four cards, put the top four cards of your library into your graveyard.)

card.name: Gnatfur Gangleader
card.text: Kicker {1}{B} (You may pay an additional {1}{B} as you cast this spell.) Deathtouch When Gnatfur Gangleader enters, if it was kicked, create two 1/1 black Rat creature tokens.

card.name: Pitiless Plunderer
card.text: Whenever another creature you control dies, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Boneclad Necromancer
card.text: When Boneclad Necromancer enters, you may exile target creature card from a graveyard. If you do, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: Gloom Sower
card.text: Whenever Gloom Sower becomes blocked by a creature, that creature's controller loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Contract Killing
card.text: Destroy target creature. Create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Disfigure
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Diabolic Edict
card.text: Target player sacrifices a creature.

card.name: Mind Drain
card.text: Target opponent discards two cards, mills a card, and loses 1 life. You gain 1 life. (To mill a cards, they put the top card of their library into their graveyard.)

card.name: Atrocious Experiment
card.text: Target player mills two cards, draws two cards, and loses 2 life. (To mill two cards, they put the top two cards of their library into their graveyard.)

card.name: Summon Undead
card.text: You may mill three cards. Then return a creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. (To mill three cards, put the top three cards of your library into your graveyard.)

card.name: Duress
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a noncreature, nonland card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Abnormal Endurance
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gets +2/+0 and gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control."

card.name: Goldhound
card.text: First strike (This creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.) Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) {T}, Sacrifice Goldhound: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Hired Laborer
card.text: Whenever Hired Laborer attacks, you may put a stun counter on it. If you do, create a Treasure token. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead. Treasure is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Bloodstone Goblin
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, if that spell was kicked, Bloodstone Goblin gets +1/+1 and gains menace until end of turn. (It can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)

card.name: Goblin Bushwhacker
card.text: Kicker {R} (You may pay an additional {R} as you cast this spell.) When Goblin Bushwhacker enters, if it was kicked, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn. (They can attack and {T} as soon as they come under your control.)

card.name: Kavu Ingressor
card.text: Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.) If Kavu Ingressor was kicked, it enters with three +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Plundering Barbarian
card.text: When Plundering Barbarian enters, choose one— • Destroy target artifact. • Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Reckless Charger
card.text: Trample When Reckless Charger enters, you may put a stun counter on it. If you do, it gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Viashino Seer
card.text: Whenever Viashino Seer enters or leaves the battlefield, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until your next end step.

card.name: Goblin Curator
card.text: Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.) {R}, Sacrifice an artifact: Goblin Curator gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Tenement Crasher
card.text: Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)

card.name: Burst Lightning
card.text: Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.) Burst Lightning deals 2 damage to any target. If this spell was kicked, it deals 4 damage instead.

card.name: Rain Fire
card.text: Rain Fire deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Act of Treason
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Burn Bright
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Infectious Bloodlust
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+1, has haste, and attacks each turn if able. When enchanted creature dies, you may search your library for a card named Infectious Bloodlust, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Titan's Strength
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+1 until end of turn. Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Violent Panic
card.text: Kicker {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell.) Target creature can't block this turn. If Violent Panic was kicked, that creature deals damage equal to its power to its controller.

card.name: Compost Pile
card.text: Defender (This creature can't attack.) {T}, Exile a card from your graveyard: Put a +1/+1 counter on Compost Pile.

card.name: Timberpack Wolf
card.text: Timberpack Wolf gets +1/+1 for each other creature you control named Timberpack Wolf.

card.name: Civic Gardener
card.text: Whenever Civic Gardener attacks, untap target creature or land.

card.name: Boding Bugs
card.text: When Boding Bugs leaves your graveyard, create a 1/1 green Insect creature token.

card.name: Mossgarden Scout
card.text: Whenever Mossgarden Scout attacks, you may put a stun counter on it. If you do, it gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Gathering Pine
card.text: {2}{G}, {T}, Put a stun counter on Gathering Pine: Mill three cards, then you may return a creature card milled this way from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Lonely Boar
card.text: As long as you control another Beast, Lonely Boar gets +0/+3.

card.name: Oakwood Sentinel
card.text: Reach (This creature can block creatures with flying.) When Oakwood Sentinel enters, search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Bloomstag
card.text: Kicker {G} (You may pay an additional {G} as you cast this spell.) When Bloomstag enters, if it was kicked, you gain 4 life.

card.name: Colossal Dreadmaw
card.text: Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.)

card.name: Bite Down
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker you don't control.

card.name: Giant Growth
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn.

card.name: Burst of Strength
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature and untap it.

card.name: Wild Gathering
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Reveal the top three cards of your library. You may put a creature or land card from among them into your hand. If Wild Gathering was kicked, repeat this process.

card.name: Puregrove's Embrace
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2. Exile three other cards from your graveyard: Return Puregrove's Embrace from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Grow from the Ashes
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. If this spell was kicked, instead search your library for two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Spiteful Scarecrow
card.text: Kicker {5} (You may pay an additional {5} as you cast this spell.) When Spiteful Scarecrow enters, exile target creature if it's a Bird or if Spiteful Scarecrow was kicked.

card.name: Skyscanner
card.text: Flying When Skyscanner enters, draw a card.

card.name: Steel Raptor
card.text: Flying Steel Raptor gets +2/-2 as long as it's tapped.

card.name: Letter of Acceptance
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Letter of Acceptance: Draw a card.

card.name: Glowstone
card.text: Whenever Glowstone is put into your graveyard from anywhere or leaves your graveyard, add one mana of any color. {1}, {T}: Sacrifice Glowstone.

card.name: Evolving Wilds
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Evolving Wilds: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Hallowed Chosen
card.text: Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Hallowed Chosen.

card.name: Gemma's Elite
card.text: Flying Whenever Gemma's Elite deals combat damage to a player, for each kind of counter on target permanent or player, give that permanent or player another counter of that kind.

card.name: Eager Redeemer
card.text: Whenever Eager Redeemer attacks, you may put a stun counter on it. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it gains lifelink until end of turn. {1}{W}: Untap target creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn.

card.name: Commander-in-Chief
card.text: Kicker {2}{W} (You may pay an additional {2}{W} as you cast this spell.) When Commander-in-Chief enters, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. If it was kicked, create three of those tokens instead. Commander-in-Chief's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creatures you control.

card.name: Irrepressible Starblade
card.text: Put a stun counter on Irrepressible Starblade: Irrepressible Starblade gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it. Activate only once per turn.

card.name: Shutterstep
card.text: Kicker {2}{W} (You may pay an additional {2}{W} as you cast this spell.) Exile target creature, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control unless this spell was kicked.

card.name: Borrowed Time
card.text: When Borrowed Time enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until Borrowed Time leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Stand in Unity
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Sigiled Starfish
card.text: {T}: Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.)

card.name: Bubbling Brewgeist
card.text: Whenever Bubbling Brewgeist becomes untapped, put a +1/+1 counter on it. {1}, {T}: Each player mills a card.

card.name: Treasure Diver
card.text: {T}, Put a stun counter on Treasure Diver: Draw a card. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Air Elemental
card.text: Flying

card.name: Slingwing Sailor
card.text: Kicker {1}{U} (You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell.) Flash Flying When Slingwing Sailor enters, if it was kicked, copy target instant or sorcery spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Plumb the Pages
card.text: Kicker {X} (You may pay an additional {X} as you cast this spell.) Draw two cards. If this spell was kicked, draw X cards instead.

card.name: Filibuster
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap an untapped creature you control and put a stun counter on it or pay {U}. Counter target spell.

card.name: Lost in the Blizzard
card.text: Return target creature or planeswalker to its owner's hand. Until your next turn, each creature you don't control enters with an additional stun counter on it.

card.name: Arcane Thievery
card.text: Kicker {1}{U} (You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell.) If this spell was kicked, each player mills three cards. You may cast an instant or sorcery card from a graveyard without paying its mana cost. If it would be put into a graveyard this turn, exile it. Exile Arcane Thievery.

card.name: Gnawing Vermin
card.text: When Gnawing Vermin enters, target player mills two cards. When Gnawing Vermin dies, target creature you don't control gets -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Vampire Hexmage
card.text: First strike (This creature deals combat damage before creatures without first strike.) Sacrifice Vampire Hexmage: Remove all counters from target permanent.

card.name: Waking Vampire
card.text: Kicker—Exile three other cards from your graveyard. (You may exile three other cards from your graveyard in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.) You may cast Waking Vampire from your graveyard by paying its kicker cost in addition to its other costs.

card.name: Gravedigger
card.text: When Gravedigger enters, you may return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Boding Vampire
card.text: When Boding Vampire leaves your graveyard, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Ruthless Knave
card.text: {2}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") Sacrifice three Treasures: Draw a card.

card.name: Dusk Mangler
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature, discard a card, or pay 4 life. When Dusk Mangler enters, each opponent sacrifices a creature, discards a card, and loses 4 life.

card.name: Hero's Downfall
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: No One Left Behind
card.text: This spell costs {3} less to cast if it targets a creature card with mana value 3 or less. Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Soul Enervation
card.text: Flash When Soul Enervation enters, target creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn. Whenever one or more creature cards leave your graveyard, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Mind Carver
Goblin Ruinblaster
card.text: Kicker {R} (You may pay an additional {R} as you cast this spell.) Haste When Goblin Ruinblaster enters, if it was kicked, destroy target nonbasic land.

card.name: Pub Stomper
card.text: Pub Stomper enters tapped with two stun counters on it.

card.name: Reckless Detective
card.text: Whenever Reckless Detective attacks, you may sacrifice an artifact or discard a card. If you do, draw a card and Reckless Detective gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Crag Monstrosity
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) If Crag Monstrosity was kicked, it enters with two +1/+1 counters on it When Crag Monstrosity enters, it deals damage equal to its power to another target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Rapacious Dragon
card.text: Flying When Rapacious Dragon enters, create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Accomplished Pyromancy
card.text: Create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token for each noncreature card in your graveyard. {R}, Discard Accomplished Pyromancy: Create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token.

card.name: Tarhild Elite
card.text: Whenever Tarhild Elite attacks, you may put up to three stun counters on it. For each stun counter put on it this way, choose one — • Tarhild Elite gets +2/+0 until end of turn. • Tarhild Elite gains double strike until end of turn. • Tarhild Elite gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Abrade
card.text: Choose one — • Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Cinderclasm
card.text: Kicker {R} (You may pay an additional {R} as you cast this spell.) Cinderclasm deals 1 damage to each creature. If it was kicked, it deals 2 damage to each creature instead.

card.name: Fight with Fire
card.text: Kicker {5}{R} (You may pay an additional {5}{R} as you cast this spell.) Fight with Fire deals 5 damage to target creature. If this spell was kicked, it deals 10 damage divided as you choose among any number of targets instead. (Those targets can include players, planeswalkers, and battles.)

card.name: Harvest Witness
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may untap another tapped creature you control. If you do, that creature gets +2/+0 and gains trample until end of turn. {1}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Untamed Kavu
card.text: Kicker {3} (You may pay an additional {3} as you cast this spell.) Vigilance, trample If Untamed Kavu was kicked, it enters with three +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Eternal Witness
card.text: When Eternal Witness enters, you may return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Harvested Treefolk
card.text: Harvested Treefolk enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. If damage would be dealt to Harvested Treefolk while it has a +1/+1 counter on it, prevent that damage, remove a +1/+1 counter from Harvested Treefolk, and create a 0/1 green Log creature token.

card.name: Rampaging Swallower
card.text: Whenever Rampaging Swallower attacks, exile up to one creature card from your graveyard. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on Rampaging Swallower. Rampaging Swallower has flying as long as you own a face-up card in exile with flying. The same is true for first strike, double strike, deathtouch, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance.

card.name: Affectionate Indrik
card.text: When Affectionate Indrik enters, you may have it fight target creature you don't control. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Stampede Frontrunner
card.text: Trample Combat damage that would be dealt by creatures you control can't be prevented.

card.name: Head of the Herd
card.text: Head of the Herd enters with a +1/+1 counter on it if you control another Beast. Each other Beast creature you control enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Fae's Blessing
card.text: Enchant land Enchanted land has "{T}: Add three mana of any one color. Spend this mana only to cast kicked spells."

card.name: Fog
card.text: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn.

card.name: Act on Impulse
card.text: Exile the top three cards of your library. Until end of turn, you may play cards exiled this way. (If you cast a spell this way, you still pay its costs. You can play a land this way only if you have an available land play remaining.)

card.name: Rust Muncher
card.text: Haste {T}, Remove a counter from a creature you control: You gain 1 life.

card.name: Juggernaut
card.text: Juggernaut attacks each combat if able. Juggernaut can't be blocked by Walls.

card.name: Brass Herald
card.text: As Brass Herald enters, choose a creature type. When Brass Herald enters, reveal the top four cards of your library. Put all creature cards of the chosen type revealed this way into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Creatures of the chosen type get +1/+1.

card.name: Power Conduit
card.text: {T}, Remove a counter from a permanent you control: Choose one — • Put a charge counter on target artifact. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Sorcerous Spyglass
card.text: As Sorcerous Spyglass enters, look at an opponent's hand, then choose any card name. Activated abilities of sources with the chosen name can't be activated unless they're mana abilities.

card.name: Emboldening Angel
card.text: Kicker {1}{W} (You may pay an additional {1}{W} as you cast this spell.) Flying, lifelink When Emboldening Angel enters, if it was kicked, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Kuhiel the Benevolent
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink Whenever damage that would be dealt to you or a creature you control is prevented, put that many +1/+1 counters on Kuhiel the Benevolent.

card.name: Angel of Paradise
card.text: Flying, lifelink If you would gain an amount of life, you gain life equal to Angel of Paradise's power instead.

card.name: Promise of Protection
card.text: Counter up to one target spell that targets you or a creature you control. If you cast this spell during your main phase, creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Glorious Anthem
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Blessed Bond
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +4/+4, has flying and vigilance, can't attack you or planeswalkers you control, and can't block creatures you control.

card.name: Prison Seal
card.text: Whenever Prison Seal or another nonland, nontoken permanent enters under your control, you may exile target permanent that shares a card type with that permanent until Prison Seal leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Skyswimmer
card.text: Flash Flying Whenever Skyswimmer blocks a creature, put a stun counter on that creature.

card.name: Djinn of Secrets
card.text: Kicker {4}{U} (You may pay an additional {4}{U} as you cast this spell.) Flying When Djinn of Secrets enters, if it was kicked, draw seven cards.

card.name: Snjar, Scion of Rime
card.text: Whenever you tap an untapped creature you control, if it isn't being declared as an attacker, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Whenever you tap an untapped creature an opponent controls, put a stun counter on it. {W}, {T}: Tap target creature.

card.name: Laboratory Maniac
card.text: If you would draw a card while your library has no cards in it, you win the game instead.

card.name: Clone
card.text: You may have Clone enter the battlefield as a copy of any creature on the battlefield.

card.name: Accumulating Stormwing
card.text: Accumulating Stormwing costs {X} less to cast, where X is the number of noncreature spells you have cast this turn. Flying; prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) When Accumulating Stormwing enters, draw a card.

card.name: Quicken
card.text: The next sorcery spell you cast this turn can be cast as though it had flash. (It can be cast any time you could cast an instant.) Draw a card.

card.name: Demon of Shared Sorrow
card.text: Kicker—Pay 5 life (You may pay 5 life in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.) Flying When Demon of Shared Sorrow enters, you may have target player's life total become equal to your own.

card.name: Ezikiel, the Dire Dream
card.text: Flying, menace, lifelink Ezikiel, the Dire Dream's power and toughness are each equal to the number of Swamps you control.

card.name: Misfortune Teller
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever Misfortune Teller enters or deals combat damage to a player, exile target card from a graveyard. If it was a creature card, create a 2/2 black Rogue creature token. If it was a land card, create a Treasure token. Otherwise, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Royal Assassin
card.text: {T}: Destroy target tapped creature.

card.name: Sanguine Alchemy
card.text: Whenever a spell or ability you control causes one or more opponents to lose 1 or more life, add {B}. Tap three Vampires you control: Each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Strike from Mythos
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a token. Exile target creature or planeswalker and all other permanents with the same name as that permanent.

card.name: Heartfire Dragon
card.text: Kicker {X}{R} (You may pay an additional {X}{R} as you cast this spell.) Flying When Heartfire Dragon enters, if it was kicked, it deals twice X damage to any target.

card.name: Professional Face-Breaker
card.text: Menace Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token. Sacrifice a Treasure: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.

card.name: Dragonspeak Escort
card.text: First strike Whenever Dragonspeak Escort attacks, you may put a stun counter on it. If you do, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn and you create a Treasure token. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead. Treasure is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Hellkite Mystic
card.text: Flying, trample; prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever Hellkite Mystic enters or attacks, exile the top four cards of your library. An opponent separates those cards into two piles, then exile the top card of your library and assign it to a random pile. Shuffle one of the piles into your library. You may play cards exiled this way on any turn you attacked with Hellkite Mystic.

card.name: Goblin Scapegoat
card.text: Whenever a creature you control becomes the target of a spell or ability with a single target, you may pay {1}. If you do, change the target of that spell or ability to a Goblin creature you control.

card.name: Southkeep Devil
card.text: At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, that player chooses a creature they control. It fights Southkeep Devil. If Southkeep Devil dies this way, the chosen creature's controller creates a Treasure token.

card.name: Cragplate Baloth
card.text: Kicker {2}{G} (You may pay an additional {2}{G} as you cast this spell.) This spell can't be countered. Hexproof, haste If Cragplate Baloth was kicked, it enters with four +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Murroc, the Living Cycle
card.text: Murroc, the Living Cycle gets +1/+1 for each land you control. You may play land cards from your graveyard.

card.name: Deathgorge Scavenger
card.text: Whenever Deathgorge Scavenger enters or attacks, you may exile target card from a graveyard. If a creature card is exiled this way, you gain 2 life. If a noncreature card is exiled this way, Deathgorge Scavenger gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Primalgoyf
card.text: Primalgoyf's power and toughness are each equal to the number of card types among cards in all graveyards. (The card types are artifact, battle, creature, enchantment, instant, kindred, land, planeswalker, and sorcery.)

card.name: Territorial Nestmother
card.text: When Territorial Nestmother dies, reveal the top X cards of your library, where X is its power. You may put any number of creatures with total power X or less from among them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Durabeetle
card.text: You and other permanents you control have ward {X}, where X is the number of counters on you or that permanent. {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Autumn's Blessing
card.text: For each card type, return up to one card of that type from your graveyard to your hand. Exile Autumn's Blessing.

card.name: Knowledge Wave
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, exile the top card of your library, then create a token that's a copy of Knowledge Wave. Whenever you cast a spell from your hand, exile it. If you do, you may cast another nonland card you own exiled by sources named Knowledge Wave without paying that card's mana cost.

card.name: Organization's Grasp
card.text: Search target opponent's library for a card and exile it face down. Then that player shuffles. You may look at and cast that card for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to cast that spell.

card.name: Lightning Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste Lightning Phoenix can't block. At the beginning of your end step, if an opponent was dealt 3 or more damage this turn, you may pay {R}. If you do, return Lightning Phoenix from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Creeping Corrosion
card.text: Destroy all artifacts.

card.name: Exhaustive Defense
card.text: If a permanent you control would be dealt damage or destroyed, you may remove a stun counter from it instead.

card.name: Reign's Dismissal
card.text: Return all nonland permanents that entered the battlefield this turn to their owners' hands.

card.name: Whipped Up
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains lifelink and haste. Exile it at end of turn.

card.name: Growing Hoard
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a gold counter on Growing Hoard. Then, each player creates a Treasure token for each gold counter on Growing Hoard. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") Sacrifice six Treasures: Search your library for a Dragon card and put it onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Megantic Growth
card.text: Enchant creature When Megantic Growth enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, put six +1/+1 counters on enchanted creature.

card.name: Null
card.text: Exile X target permanents.

card.name: Subject 01
card.text: Ward {2} Whenever a planeswalker enters under your control, you may choose one of its loyalty abilities. If you do, put a loyalty counter on Subject 01 and it gains that ability. (Until this creature leaves the battlefield. You may activate one of its loyalty abilities once during each of your turns as a sorcery.)

card.name: Kilvik Shieldmaiden
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Tapped creatures you control can block as though they were untapped.

card.name: Dreamweft
card.text: When Dreamweft enters, each opponent mills two cards. Whenever one or more cards are put into an opponent's graveyard from their library, you may exile up to one of those cards. For as long as that card remains exiled, you may play it.

card.name: Demonic Proviso
card.text: Search your library for a card that shares a name with a face-up card you own in exile, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Zenith Memorial
card.text: As an additional cost to cast Zenith Memorial, exile a creature card from your graveyard. At the beginning of your precombat main phase, add {R}.

card.name: Eldrazi Delimiter
card.text: (Devoid cards have no color.) Kicker {3}{G}{G} (You may pay an additional {3}{G}{G} as you cast this spell.) If Eldrazi Delimiter was kicked, it enters with fifteen +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Gureza, Vitality Warden
card.text: Flying, vigilance, lifelink If a spell or ability would destroy or exile another non-Zombie creature you control, that creature becomes a 0/3 Zombie in addition to its other types instead.

card.name: Patron of Battle
card.text: Flying, vigilance When Patron of Battle enters, if it's your main phase, there's an additional combat phase after this phase. At the beginning of that combat, remove all stun counters from each creature you control, then untap those creatures.

card.name: Probe the Eons
card.text: Kicker {2}{U} (You may pay an additional {2}{U} as you cast this spell.) If this spell was kicked, create a 4/4 blue Sphinx creature token with flying. Take an extra turn after this one. Exile Probe the Eons.

card.name: Worst Fears
card.text: You control target player during that player's next turn. Exile Worst Fears. (You see all cards that player could see and make all decisions for the player.)

card.name: Descent of the Dragons
card.text: Destroy any number of target creatures. For each creature destroyed this way, its controller creates a 4/4 red Dragon creature token with flying.

card.name: Jotun Leveler
card.text: Whenever Jotun Leveler attacks, put two stun counters on it.

card.name: Void Winnower
card.text: Your opponents can't cast spells with even mana values. (Zero is even.) Your opponents can't block with creatures with even mana values.

card.name: Platinum Angel
card.text: Flying You can't lose the game and your opponents can't win the game.

card.name: Prismatic Command
card.text: Choose two— • Target player gains 7 life. • Target player draws two cards. • Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Prismatic Command deals 5 damage to any target. • Put two +1/+1 counters on each creature target player controls.

card.name: Ascendancy Engine
card.text: If equipped creature would deal damage, it deals double that damage instead. Activated abilities of equipped creature cost {2} less to activate. This effect can't reduce the mana in that cost to less than one mana. {2}: Equipped creature gains your choice of flying, first strike, vigilance, trample, or haste until end of turn. Equip {4}

card.name: Tireless Tender
card.text: As Tireless Tender enters, choose Clue, Food, or Treasure. If one or more tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus an additional token of the chosen type are created instead.

card.name: Hardworking Crab
card.text: {3}{U}, {T}: Target player mills five cards. {T}, Put a stun counter on Hardworking Crab: Target player mills five cards.

card.name: Battlefield Tactician
card.text: Whenever Battlefield Tactician attacks, you may put a stun counter on it. If you do, it gets +2/+0 until end of turn. At the beginning of combat on your turn, if Battlefield Tactician is tapped, target creature gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Baloth Gorger
card.text: Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.) If Baloth Gorger was kicked, it enters with three +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Timeshift
card.text: Kicker {2}{U} (You may pay an additional {2}{U} as you cast this spell.) Return target creature to its owner's hand. If this spell was kicked, that creature's owner puts it on top or bottom of their library instead.

card.name: Septim Druid
card.text: {T}: Add {R} or {G}. Whenever you cast a kicked spell, put two +1/+1 counters on Septim Druid. Untap it.

card.name: Warp Existence
card.text: Choose one or both— • Exile target creature or planeswalker you control, then return that card to the battlefield under your control. • Return target creature or planeswalker card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Amalgamate
card.text: Surveil 2, then create an X/X colorless Construct artifact creature token, where X is the number of noncreature cards in your graveyard. (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Tideshell Homarid
card.text: When Tideshell Homarid enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, put a +1/+1 counter on it. If a fourth +1/+1 counter would be put on Tideshell Homarid, remove all +1/+1 counters from it and put a stun counter on it instead.

card.name: Cathedral of Stars
card.text: Cathedral of Stars enters with a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Cathedral of Dew
card.text: Cathedral of Dew enters with a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Cathedral of Clouds
card.text: Cathedral of Clouds enters with a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Cathedral of Shale
card.text: Cathedral of Shale enters with a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Cathedral of Slate
card.text: Cathedral of Slate enters with a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Cathedral of Dust
card.text: Cathedral of Dust enters with a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Cathedral of Storms
card.text: Cathedral of Storms enters with a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Cathedral of Moss
card.text: Cathedral of Moss enters with a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Cathedral of Pain
card.text: Cathedral of Pain enters with a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Cathedral of the Sun
card.text: Cathedral of the Sun enters with a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.) {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Brightmeadow Soother
card.text: {W}, {T}, Put a stun counter on Brightmeadow Soother: Tap target creature you don't control and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Mantle of Tides
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+2. Whenever you draw your second card each turn, attach Mantle of Tides to target creature you control. Equip {3} ({3}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Harvester's Scythe
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has deathtouch. Equip {2}

card.name: Boots of Speed
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and has haste. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Rosethorn Halberd
card.text: When Rosethorn Halberd enters, attach it to target non-Human creature you control. Equipped creature gets +2/+1. Equip {5} ({5}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Moment of Heroism
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Day of Judgment
card.text: Destroy all creatures.

card.name: Wind Drake
card.text: Flying

card.name: Archangel
card.text: Flying (This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.) Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)

card.name: Glorious Redemption
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Untap it. If it's still tapped, repeat this process until the creature is untapped.

card.name: Numerophile
card.text: As Numerophile enters, secretly choose and note a number from 1 to 5. At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, that player chooses a number from 1 to 5 which they haven't chosen this way. If the noted number is chosen, reveal that number, sacrifice Numerophile, you draw that many cards and you lose that much life. Otherwise, that player loses life equal to the chosen number.

card.name: Thrill of Possibility
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards.

card.name: Force of Gravity
card.text: Choose one or both — • Target creature loses flying until end of turn. • Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Realized Might
card.text: Target creature gets +X/+X until end of turn. If you cast this spell during your main phase, that creature also gains vigilance and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Static Breakdasher
card.text: Flash Whenever Static Breakdasher or another artifact or creature you control leaves the battlefield, Static Breakdasher deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Gemma of the Ringed Court
card.text: [+2]: Put a loyalty counter on each other permanent you control with a loyalty ability. [+1]: Until end of turn, target creature gains vigilance and gets +1/+1 for each loyalty counter on Gemma of the Ringed Court. [-3]: Create a white enchantment token named Glittering Boon with "Creatures you control get +1/+1."

card.name: Davriel Cane
card.text: [+1]: Each player mills cards until they've milled two nonland cards this way. You lose 2 life. [-2]: You may sacrifice a creature. If you do, destroy another target creature or planeswalker. [-3]: Exile target card from a graveyard. You may cast that card for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to cast that spell.

card.name: Ugtug Bladeheart
card.text: [+1]: Up to one target creature gets +1/+1 and gains first strike until end of turn. [-2]: Until end of turn, whenever a creature you control attacks, it deals 1 damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking. [-6]: You get an emblem with "Whenever a creature enters under your control, it gets +3/+3 and gains haste until end of turn."

card.name: Bramblebark of the Gyre
card.text: [+1]: You may have Bramblebark of the Gyre lose all types and become a 0/X Treefolk creature with hexproof and reach until your next turn, where X is its loyalty. [-2]: Create a 1/3 green Treefolk creature token. [-4]: You get an emblem with "Creatures you control get +0/+1 and assign combat damage equal to their toughness rather than their power."

card.name: Reign Shoretreader
card.text: [+1]: Tap up to one target permanent and put a stun counter on it. [-2]: Mill six cards, then exile up to one target instant or sorcery card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. [-5]: Tap each creature your opponents control. Put two stun counters on each of them.
